suggestions.topic: Formal DFI decision for EIP-7904 (compute repricing) from Glamsterdam
suggestions.rationale: Deferred in #237 pending Geth benchmarks by end of May. All other clients hit 100M gas/sec with BAL optimizations. Decision should be finalized now.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-4 status and path to devnet-5
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-4 was targeting launch on May 21 with Nethermind + ethrex + 4 CL clients. Status update critical for Glamsterdam timeline and determining if 8037 fixes from bal-devnet-7 are ready for merge.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7702 delegation BAL change inclusion decision
suggestions.rationale: Change was deferred from devnet-4 pending BAL Discord alignment. Two weeks have passed since deferral; clients should report on Discord discussion outcome and whether change should enter next devnet.

suggestions.topic: Deposit limit cap (EIP-8254) and 200M gas floor status
suggestions.rationale: EIP-8254 was PFI'd in #236 as blocker for 200M gas floor. Discussion ongoing but no resolution reported in #237. Critical for Glamsterdam gas target.

suggestions.topic: Hegota headliner selection: Account Abstraction proposals review
suggestions.rationale: Frame transactions (8141) CFI'd as non-headliner in #233, but no EL headliner selected. AA prioritized as theme. Multiple AA proposals now PFI'd (8188, 8182, 4758, 7709, 8253) - time to narrow scope or select headliner approach.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8246 (remove SELFDESTRUCT burn) formal CFI status update
suggestions.rationale: Decision made to remove selfdestruct burn in #236, but formal CFI status not explicitly confirmed. Administrative cleanup needed.

suggestions.topic: Reorg depth target (38 days) and Engine API implementation status
suggestions.rationale: 38-day target discussed in #236 with action items for EIP update and Hive tests. No follow-up reported. Engine API PR 786 was selected in #235 but implementation status unclear.
